name: m
description: Use-case-centric spec system with four-agent implementation pipeline

commands.name: msetup
commands.description: Initialize project: PROJECT.md, TECH-STACK.md, ACTORS.md, GLOSSARY.md, FEATURES.md

commands.name: mfeature
commands.description: Create a new feature with EARS requirements via creation interview

commands.name: musecase
commands.description: Create a new use case within a feature via creation interview

commands.name: mspec
commands.description: Generate or update architecture.md with C4, ER, event topology

commands.name: mschema
commands.description: Reverse-engineer database schema from codebase into SCHEMA.md

commands.name: mstories
commands.description: Generate Gherkin scenarios from a use case file

commands.name: mupdate-feature
commands.description: Update an existing feature's requirements or architecture

commands.name: mupdate-usecase
commands.description: Update an existing use case file, increment version, set dirty

commands.name: mreverse-feature
commands.description: Reverse-engineer a feature from existing codebase

commands.name: mreverse-usecase
commands.description: Reverse-engineer a use case from existing codebase

commands.name: mreverse-glossary
commands.description: Generate GLOSSARY.md from codebase using seed terms

commands.name: mrun
commands.description: Execute four-agent pipeline for a UC or all new/dirty UCs in a feature

commands.name: mdev
commands.description: Implement a task from the task plan

commands.name: mtest
commands.description: Write, run, or analyze tests for code

commands.name: mcommit
commands.description: Create a well-formatted commit from staged changes

commands.name: mreview
commands.description: Code review on staged or recent changes

commands.name: mresearch
commands.description: Deep research with parallel agents and long-form output
